assertions.expectation: Explains that spot VMs can be preempted at any time, which interacts with the upgrade drain process
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains that spot instances can be preempted during upgrade process and creates 'double jeopardy' with rolling upgrade disruptions

assertions.expectation: Notes that spot node pools may already have workloads designed for interruption (good for upgrades)
assertions.reason: Response doesn't explicitly mention that workloads on spot instances are already designed for interruption, which makes upgrades easier

assertions.expectation: Recommends higher maxSurge for spot pools since the workloads should already be fault-tolerant
assertions.reason: Response shows increasing max-surge-upgrade to 2 in the gcloud command example for spot pools

assertions.expectation: Advises setting maxUnavailable >0 for spot pools since workloads are already preemption-tolerant
assertions.reason: Response actually shows --max-unavailable-upgrade=0, which is the opposite of what the expectation requires

assertions.expectation: Mentions that spot VM availability may affect surge node creation (not guaranteed to get spot instances)
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking spot instance availability in zones and monitoring spot pricing trends as considerations

assertions.expectation: Recommends having PDBs even for spot workloads to ensure orderly drain during upgrade
assertions.reason: Response provides a specific PodDisruptionBudget YAML example and emphasizes ensuring PDBs as part of workload resilience preparation

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for configuring surge settings on the spot pool
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud container node-pools update command with max-surge-upgrade and max-unavailable-upgrade parameters

assertions.expectation: Suggests upgrading spot pools before on-demand pools since they're lower risk
assertions.reason: Response doesn't specifically recommend upgrading spot pools before on-demand pools or mention that spot pools are lower risk
